article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of the Mexican producer known for collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of the Noizekid Sample Pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His production style is rooted in the energetic rhythms of moombahton and dancehall, blending electronic elements with traditional dancehall beats.
Noizekid's work has been recognized by peers and industry figures, contributing to his growing profile within the Latin electronic music scene.
